query: DELETE FROM projectStatusHistory WHERE changedBy IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role IN ('admin', 'comercial', 'disenador', 'jefe_taller', 'operario') AND email NOT IN ('alejoile300@gmail.com', 'martha79s@hotmail.com'));
